name: Luoyang Xinqianglian Slewing Bearing Co., Ltd.
summary: Luoyang Xinqianglian Slewing Bearing Co., Ltd. manufactures heavy duty slewing bearings for industrial purposes in China and internationally. The company offers four-point contact ball, double row ball, three-row roller, ball-roller combination, and cross-roller slewing bearings. Its products are used in various applications, which include cranes, wind turbines, tunnel boring machines, concrete pump trucks, CT scanners, stackers and reclaimers, etc. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Luoyang, China.
